ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Mitz, Esq. 510-465-3922 of Rankin Sproat Mires Reynolds Shuey & Mintz for Defendant.
No Other Apearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALEKSANDR A. VOLKOV, ESQ. DBA VOLKOV LAW FIRM's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR LEGAL MALPRACTICE.

Defendants' demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AYSC)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set March 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Anne Kihagi appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is re-set to November 28, 2017 at 10:30 am in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
